examples: That rapid replication rate also increased the chances of strains evolving in ways that allowed them to evade hog immune systems.
A number of studies reported there are unusual inverted repeats in the neighborhood of the replication origins of herpesviruses.
Some authors further distinguish between propagation (local replication) and migration (getting from one system to another).
After all, it still requires extensive replication to result in a new treatment protocol.
